description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow situated on a sloped lot with a curved driveway and a small landscaped area featuring a palm tree. The structure has a flat roof and clean, angular lines, with large window openings and a mix of solid and glazed wall sections. The front facade is set back from the street, with a prominent entryway and a garage integrated into the design. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with some darker accents on the driveway and retaining walls. The building appears to have an open-plan layout, with multiple access points and outdoor spaces. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding urban environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a curved driveway, set on a sloped urban lot with minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front corner view showing the main entry, curved driveway, and landscaped area with a palm tree.
description_view_1: Side elevation highlighting the elongated structure, flat roof, and garage entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sloped lot, retaining wall, and minimal backyard space.
description_view_3: Street-side view with the main facade, large windows, and the driveway curving around the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
